utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the required format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. (2) financing: includes type, down payment, loan amount, estimated rate, amortization, monthly payment, and arrangement fee — sufficient. (3) legal_services: includes legal fees and land transfer tax with note on rebates — acceptable for a draft. (4) moving_services: includes a standard moving package with a cost — sufficient. (5) setup_services: includes inspection, utilities connection, premium setup, and estimated monthly utilities — sufficient. (6) total_budget: includes line items and a total initial out-of-pocket estimate — sufficient. Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and reasonably detailed for an initial draft.
